title: Parent Phase A3 — Pre-flight Scope/Registry Intersection
execution_plan_ref: docs/platform/EXECUTION_PLAN.md - M365 CPS Track A P3

principles: Tool-first determinism (capability surface must equal advertised surface)
Operator observability (the system must explain its own state)
Plan-first execution with strict per-phase gates
anti_alignment: Mutation fence on actual write actions stays on
Risk-tier classification per agent stays unchanged
Two-phase confirmation gate for high-risk mutations stays on

user_stated_requirements: Add token-vs-registry intersection to /v1/auth/check and pass through UCP. Operators know what their session can do before they call.
intent_capture.intent_verification: Tasks T1..T7 together satisfy this parent phase's objective.

objective: Add token-vs-registry intersection to /v1/auth/check and pass through UCP. Operators know what their session can do before they call.
current_state: Parent phase scope draft; no implementation yet.
target_state: All child tasks complete; GATE green; commit + push to feat/m365-cps-trkA.

file_denylist: Any file not in allowlist of the active child-phase task

requirements.description: Carry-through of master R3; this parent phase contributes scoped behavior.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Per-task exit criteria; parent GATE passes.

requirements.description: Carry-through of master R8; this parent phase contributes scoped behavior.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Per-task exit criteria; parent GATE passes.

tasks.name: Define intersection algorithm
tasks.description: Document the algorithm for token-vs-registry intersection: invokable = {a in REGISTRY : session.auth_mode in a.auth_modes AND a.scopes <= session.granted_scopes}. blocked_by_auth_mode = REGISTRY \ invokable filtered by auth_mode. blocked_by_scopes = REGISTRY \ invokable filtered by scopes.

tasks.name: Implement intersection in runtime
tasks.description: Add compute_intersection(session_state) function in m365_runtime that returns {invokable_actions, blocked_by_auth_mode, blocked_by_scopes}.

tasks.name: Surface in /v1/auth/check response
tasks.description: Update auth_check handler in m365_runtime to call compute_intersection and include the result under 'preflight' key in response.
files_to_modify: M365: src/m365_runtime/auth/oauth.py or wherever auth_check lives

tasks.name: Surface in UCP m365_auth_check
tasks.description: Update UCP m365_auth_check tool to pass through the preflight intersection in its return.

tasks.name: Unit tests both repos
deliverables: Test files updated in both repos
tasks.validation_command: cd $M365_ROOT && .venv/bin/python -m pytest -k preflight -x && cd $UCP_ROOT && .venv/bin/python -m pytest -k preflight -x

tasks.name: Pre-commit + make test
tasks.validation_command: cd $M365_ROOT && pre-commit run --all-files && make test && cd $UCP_ROOT && pre-commit run --all-files && make test

tasks.name: Commit (no push)
tasks.validation_command: cd $UCP_ROOT && git log --oneline -1 | grep 'plan:m365-cps-trkA-p3' && cd $M365_ROOT && git log --oneline -1 | grep 'plan:m365-cps-trkA-p3'

checks.name: Parent phase A3 integration
checks.description: All child tasks T1..T7 green; integration test pass

no_go_triggers: Any child task fails its validation_command

agent_constraints: Do not touch files outside Section 5 file allowlist.
Do not skip or reorder tasks (Section 7 strict ordering).
Do not modify thresholds or invariants to make gates green without owner approval.
Do not execute until plan status is approved.
Reference plan:{plan-id}:{task-id} in all action log entries and commits.
Do not add tasks, gates, or deliverables not in this plan without owner approval.
Call validate_action MCP tool before any write operation (UCP server).
Each child phase commits locally; no push until parent-phase GATE is green.
Each parent-phase GATE pushes to feat/m365-cps-trk{X} branch only.
Each track GATE merges to development (UCP) and main (M365) only after live tenant smoke green.
